tiles.title: Aegean Blue Ceramic
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile inspired by the deep blue waters of the Aegean Sea. Perfect for bathroom and kitchen walls.
tiles.creator: ArtTile Studio

tiles.title: Terra Cotta Rustica
tiles.description: Earthy terracotta tile with a rustic finish. Brings warmth and natural beauty to any living space.
tiles.creator: Earth & Clay Co.
tiles.style: Traditional firing technique with natural clay pigments

tiles.title: Marble Blanc Elite
tiles.description: Luxurious white marble-effect porcelain tile. Creates an elegant and sophisticated atmosphere.
tiles.creator: Luxe Surfaces
tiles.style: Italian marble reproduction with micro-texture finish

tiles.title: Geometric Noir Mosaic
tiles.description: Bold black and white geometric mosaic tile. A contemporary statement piece for modern interiors.
tiles.creator: UrbanMosaic Lab
tiles.style: Hand-cut geometric pattern inspired by Bauhaus movement

tiles.title: Jade Forest Stone
tiles.description: Deep green natural stone-effect tile capturing the essence of ancient forest paths.
tiles.creator: Forest & Stone
tiles.style: Nature-inspired with organic texture and deep color saturation

tiles.title: Sunrise Saffron Zellige
tiles.description: Handmade Moroccan Zellige tile in warm saffron tones. Each piece is unique with slight variations.
tiles.creator: Marrakech Artisans
tiles.style: Traditional Zellige technique passed down through generations

tiles.title: Nordic Frost Matte
tiles.description: Cool-toned matte ceramic tile inspired by Scandinavian winters. Clean and calming.
tiles.creator: Nordic Tile House
tiles.style: Matte finish with subtle texture inspired by frost patterns

tiles.title: Midnight Galaxy Metallic
tiles.description: Dramatic dark tile with metallic flecks that shimmer like stars. Creates an immersive atmosphere.
tiles.creator: Cosmos Surfaces
tiles.style: High-gloss metallic finish with embedded mineral flecks
